goal: Implement explicit multi-model participant selection and task board state modeling.
non_goals: Do not default to opening all provider pages.
Do not fully replace native provider chat history.
Do not auto-send without a user-enabled advanced option.
acceptance_criteria: Current page is the only default participant.
Other providers must be manually selected before opening or binding pages.
Task board displays per-provider status cards.
Status cards include not_open, ready, inserted, waiting_user_send, waiting_response, captured, and error states.
The board stores task-level prompt and response snapshots without claiming full chat sync.
